Restaurant Foyer.name: Luigi's Italian Bistro - Entrance
Restaurant Foyer.description: Red-checkered tablecloths and the smell of garlic and woodsmoke. Dean Martin croons from a speaker. To the north is the Dining Room, and the Bar Area sits to the east.
Restaurant Foyer.first_entry_text:
You push through the door just as {visionary} knocks over a tray of wine glasses, screaming about fire and falling glass.

Now the host is furious, waving a towel and threatening to call the cops. The romantic atmosphere is completely dead.

furniture.name: Host Stand
furniture.description: A heavy wooden podium with a reservation book. A massive, ornate glass chandelier hangs directly above it.

objects.name: Host Radio
objects.description: A small radio playing Italian standards. It crackles with static, the music warping into a strange, low frequency.

objects.name: Reservation Book
objects.description: Open to tonight. The last reservation is for a name you recognize - and it was marked as arrived three minutes ago.

Dining Room.name: Dining Room
Dining Room.description: The main dining room. Eight tables, five occupied. A towering wine rack spans the west wall. A fireplace crackles warmly.

furniture.name: Wine Rack
furniture.description: A floor-to-ceiling wine rack. Some bottles are dusty. The top shelf is dangerously overloaded.

skin.description: A heavy industrial ceiling fan wobbling violently on a stripped mounting bracket.
A floor-to-ceiling wine rack. Some bottles are dusty. The top shelf is dangerously overloaded.

objects.name: Lit Fireplace
objects.description: A real wood-burning fireplace. The fire is high and the protective screen is not fully closed.

objects.name: Overhead Beam
objects.description: A decorative wooden beam runs the length of the ceiling. One of the mounting brackets looks recently loosened.

Bar Area.name: Bar Area
Bar Area.description: A small bar at the side of the restaurant. Three bar stools. A TV above the bar showing a sports match. The bartender is watching the game more than the drinks.

furniture.name: Bar Counter
furniture.description: Polished wood with rings from wet glasses. The stools wobble.

objects.name: Bar TV
objects.description: The TV flickers twice during what should be a commercial. For a fraction of a second, it shows a blazing inferno that is definitely not sports.

Kitchen.name: Kitchen
Kitchen.description: A proper commercial kitchen. Hot, loud, and dangerous. Two ranges, a deep fryer, a walk-in cold room, and enough open flame to be genuinely concerning. Staff move around each other with practiced efficiency.

furniture.name: Prep Shelf
furniture.description: A stainless steel shelf above the prep area.

furniture.name: Deep Fryer
furniture.description: At temperature. The oil shimmers. A basket of food sits half-submerged, forgotten.

objects.name: Commercial Range
objects.description: Six gas burners, all lit, all high. The ventilation hood above is running but struggling.

objects.name: Walk-In Door
objects.description: The door to the cold room has a heavy spring latch. The handle is frosty.

Private Dining Room.name: Private Dining Room
Private Dining Room.description: A curtained-off room for larger parties. Currently empty and dim. The table is set for eight but nobody is here. At the far end, a door to the back alley stands open a crack.

furniture.name: Set Table
furniture.description: Eight place settings. Eight chairs. One chair has been pushed back slightly, as if someone just stood up.

objects.name: Cracked Door
objects.description: The door to the back alley. Someone propped it open. Night air comes in.

Back Alley Exit.name: Back Alley Exit
Back Alley Exit.description: The service alley behind the restaurant. Bins, a delivery entrance, and a chain link fence at the far end. The alley connects to the main street.

furniture.name: Dumpster
furniture.description: The dumpster lid hangs open. Something moved inside it. Hopefully a raccoon.

objects.name: Delivery Ledger
objects.description: A clipboard hanging by the delivery door. The last delivery was signed for twenty minutes ago. The signature is illegible.
